items.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
items.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

items.title: Why supporting a shelter for women is now 'kind of radioactive'
items.description: That's how researcher Beatriz Garcia Nice describes the new U.S. stance under the Trump administration to programs addressing gender-based violence.

items.title: Getting the abortion pill via telehealth is more common now. NPR wants to hear your story
